calendar.matters:
Notice Of Haering On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jan-30-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Drew A. Callahan, Esq. of Aldridge Pite, LLP, T:619.326.2406, for plaintiff, on Court Call;
Peter N. Hadiaris, Esq., T:415.568.4937, for defendant Tatiana Tilley who is also present in court.

RULING: After examining the defendant re: her capacity to pay, the Court ruled as follows: DEFENDANT TATIANA TILLEY'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is DENIED. The levying officer is instructed to withhold $150.00 per pay period for payment on the judgment.

ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; mtorreano@sftc.org.
